notes: vMLX v2 (Swift) is now the recommended desktop app. Native Swift + Metal, 50–95 t/s on M-series. Pure SwiftUI, zero PyTorch in the hot path. Get the Swift DMG at https://github.com/jjang-ai/vmlx/releases/download/v2.0.0-beta.15/vMLX-2.0.0-beta.15-arm64.dmg. The Python panel continues to ship from this manifest under `legacyUrl` for users who prefer the Electron app or run the engine via `pip install vmlx`.
